title: The Water Cycle in Motion
description: Trace a water molecule through all six fluxes — evaporation, transpiration, condensation, precipitation, infiltration, runoff — via a Manim animation and a draggable SVG timeline. Run the Python cell to watch the cycle come to life, then use the mass-balance simulator to see why precipitation must equal ET + R + ΔS.

citation.text: Trenberth, K.E. et al. (2007). Estimates of the global water budget. J. Hydrometeorol., 8(4), 758–769.

author: Mohammad Galib, Purdue University
